hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "${f##*/}" in train_nn.py|train_transformer.py|train_transformer_msrr.py) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Frozen production script — make changes in experiments/ instead (see RESEARCH_LOG.md). Remove this hook in .claude/settings.json to override."}}';; esac
